name: controle-equipes
description: Órion SAD + Órion Suporte. Dev: API :3002, SAD Vite :5173 (strict), Suporte Vite :5180 (strict). npm run start:full sobe os três.

scripts.start:full: concurrently -n api,sad,suporte -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:orion-suporte"
scripts.install:all: cd afastamentos-api && npm install && cd ../afastamentos-web && npm install && cd ../orion-suporte-web && npm install
